content:
On x86, the build will currently emit a few different warnings:

  • vmlinux.o: warning: objtool: _R[...]+0x9: 'naked' return found in MITIGATION_RETHUNK build
  • die__process_function: tag not supported 0x2f (template_type_parameter)!
  • die__process_class: tag not supported 0x33 (variant_part)!
  • die__create_new_enumeration: DW_TAG_subprogram (0x2e) @ <0x4307c36> not handled!
  • tag__recode_dwarf_type: couldn't find name for function 0x4319701, abstract_origin=0, specification=0x4307c36

What's the status on fixing these warnings?
I recall hearing about some partial progress on the MITIGATION_RETHUNK issue, but I don't know about the other four warnings.
It's possible they're an Android-specific tool. If so, sorry for the noise.

Alice Ryhl said:

I recall hearing about some partial progress on the MITIGATION_RETHUNK issue, but I don't know about the other four warnings.

I submitted the patch for that months ago (together with a couple other mitigations), they got no reply and no reply to a ping either.

Anyway, I have been preparing a v2 since they need an update by this point in time. Hopefully they will be processed this time.
Do you have a link to the updated version? (it's fine if it's wip)
